Test name: CCRs (60 km/h)

Test Description

In the Car-to-Car Rear Stationary (CCRs) scenario, subject vehicle travels forwards towards a stationary target vehicle and the foremost part of the subject vehicle strikes the rearmost part of the target vehicle. In this scenario, the target vehicle speed is always considered as 0 km/h. The driver does not brake at any moment during the AEB sequence.

  • Regulation or protocol: UN Regulation No. 152
  • Ego speed: 60 km/h
  • Target speed: 0 km/h
  • Overlap between both vehicles: 100%
  • TTC at start: greater than 4 s
Home Summary Repetition 1
CCRs (60 km/h) CCRm (30 km/h)→
